lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: How is the adventuring going, my friend?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I don't have anything for you to do right now, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am getting strong and mighty. Grrr

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Ah well, at least you keep coming back to life!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Go ahead - it's a very good range. It's easier to use than most other ranges.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Its called the Cook-o-matic 100. It uses a combination of state of the art temperature regulation and magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will it mean my food will burn less often?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Well, that's what the salesman told us anyway...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You were seriously great when you defeated the Culinaromancer! I can't believe I nearly caused all of those people to be killed! So how is the adventuring going now?

sections.title: Interacting with the cooking range in Lumbridge Castle before finishing Cook's Assistant

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Hey, who said you could use that?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Please tell me how many cannons there are.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Hmm, I don't think that's right.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I've always wondered how many cannons the castle has. Could you find out for me?
